narrative.headline: What 2014 Volkswagen Passat owners report most
narrative.summary: Air bag warning light illumination is by far the most-reported concern for this model, often accompanied by clicking or popping noises from the steering area. Engine complaints center on turbocharger failures that progress from unusual noises to power loss and eventually leave the vehicle undrivable. Electrical system and fuel/propulsion issues round out the pattern, with owners noting connectivity faults and turbo-related failures that sometimes required multiple dealership repairs.

issues.title: Air Bags
issues.blurb: Owners report the air bag warning light illuminating, in some cases preceded by clicking and popping noises when the steering wheel is turned. · 1 fire · 12 crash · 9 injured

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners describe turbocharger failures that begin with unusual noises, progress to power loss and dashboard warning lights, and in some cases leave the vehicle undrivable by the time it reaches a dealership. · 1 fire

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report Bluetooth and audio system malfunctions, including the system failing to recognize contacts by name, which draws driver attention away from the road. · 2 fire · 1 crash

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report turbo-related failures accompanied by warning signs before breakdown, with dealership repairs involving multiple components including the turbo, gaskets, and particulate filter. · 2 fire · 2 crash · 1 injured
